rooms.chat.dice.title: {actor}'s roll
rooms.chat.panel.title: Table panel
rooms.denied: Only an authenticated Keeper can use this command.
rooms.open.result: Shared room opened. Terminal join key: {key} (session: {session}). Hand this key to terminal players so they share this session.
rooms.open.no_keystore: Cannot open a shared room here: no terminal keystore is attached.
rooms.private_required: Open rooms in a private chat with the bot.
rooms.link.result: This channel is now linked to shared session {session}.
rooms.link.invalid_key: That isn't a valid room join key. Ask the room's host for a key from .room open.
rooms.leave.none: This channel is not linked to any shared session.
rooms.show.none: This channel is not linked to a shared session. Use .room open to create one.
